sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 122 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection / reply. 2. For orders on CMA No.5503/2023. 3. For orders on CMA No.5502/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. 27.11.2025 Matter is pending since 2016 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Back in 2023 two weeks’ time was granted for compliance of office objections but even that had not been done till date. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
